description: The 'Ndrina Scumaci is a 'ndrina (criminal clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in the province of Catanzaro. It is allied with other 'ndrine such as the Grande Aracri, Trapasso-Zoffreo, Mannolo, and Tropea-Talarico. The clan is involved in organized crime activities typical of the 'Ndrangheta.
